name: Live 4" Ward Potted Bamboo Plant - Good Little Garden™
description:
Bring natural, visually striking beauty to your favorite spaces with this Ward 4-inch Bamboo from Good Little Garden™. Sourced from Apopka, Florida, this 4-inch bamboo plant comes secured in a pot and grows best in bright, indirect sunlight. It's the perfect vibrant accent to your desk, bookshelf or entryway.

Care Instructions
Place in bright, indirect sunlight. Water once per week and keep at temperatures 65-85 degrees Fahrenheit.

Good Little Garden™: Where bright days bloom.™
